coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If target has [RetaliationBook], inflict 1 [PlusCoinValueDown] next turn

1050701.name: Loyalty
1050701.desc:
- Apply [RetaliationBook] to the unit that dealt the most Skill damage to an ally.
- If the main target has [RetaliationBook], Final Power +1
- If there is another surviving ally from the Middle, heal 6 SP at every Turn End

1050711.name: Loyalty
1050711.desc:
- Apply [RetaliationBook] to the unit that dealt the most Skill damage to an ally.
- If the main target has [RetaliationBook], Final Power +1
- If there is another surviving ally from the Middle other than this unit, this unit and the surviving ally from the Middle with the least SP both heal 6 SP at every Turn End

1050721.name: One Family
1050721.desc: The 1 ally with the least SP heals 10 SP at Turn End if there is another ally from the same Faction
